description: The Società di Polistena is a 'ndrangheta criminal organization based in Polistena, Calabria, Italy, with influence in surrounding towns. It has been active since the late 19th century, with early recorded bosses including Pasquale Ferrara and Francesco Sergio. The group engaged in drug and arms trafficking, and was involved in reconstruction profiteering after the 1905 earthquake. It remains active, with historical ties to the Guerrisi and Mercuri families.
